---
title: "About"
---

DRAFT!! MODIFY THIS LATER!!

Hi, I'm **Bogo** — a developer with a passion for understanding the math and engineering behind machine learning systems.

This blog is where I document things I've worked hard to understand: probabilistic models, inference algorithms, system design, and whatever else is currently breaking my brain.

## What you'll find here

Posts tend to be technical and go into the weeds. I write them mostly for my own future reference, but I hope they're useful to others too.

Topics I return to often:

- Bayesian inference & variational methods
- Probabilistic programming
- ML systems & engineering
- Statistics done carefully

## Background

I'm currently working on [what you do — update this]. Previously [prior role/project — update this].

You can find my code on [GitHub](https://github.com/AJBogo9) and connect with me on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/bogo9/).
